objective: Objectif de stratégie de trading: Sur le token WALUSDC dans le timeframe 4h, utiliser l'indicateur ROC et l'indicateur Aroon pour une detection des points d'ouverture/fermetures. Ensuite, appliquer la combinaison EMA + OBV via un filtre de volatilité (ATR > 20). Pour le contrôle dynamique du risque, ajuster les SL en fonction de l'amplitude des moves, et TP sur une base Keltner. Utiliser également ROC pour détecter les angles prometteurs avec un angle >= 45. L'ensemble doit être validé par la gestion non-linéaire (SL/TP en fonction de volatilité), la gating par volatilité implicite/réalisée, une approche asymétrique à court et long terme, et un filtre horaire pour liquidité. Pour vérifier l'hypothèse, mesurer le rendement net après une période d'exploitation de 7 jours.

iterations.hypothesis: Bollinger breakout with ADX trend filter reduces false signals in ranging markets and ATR-based risk management helps to control the risk better.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy proposed is based on Bollinger breakout and ATR as risk management indicators. The combination of EMA, OBV with volatility filter (ATR > 20), ROC for promising angles (>=45) and a variety of other techniques to validate the hypothesis are present in this trading strategy. However, potential weaknesses could be related to market conditions that don't fit well into Bollinger breakout model or non-linear SL/TP adjustments based on volatility, which might lead to poor performance. If results are found to be negative (i.e., a loss), changing the risk management approach such as using ATR alone for managing risk and adjusting parameters like period of EMA and OBV filter in order to optimize its sensitivity could potentially improve performance. Modifying the Bollinger breakout model by introducing more conditions or adjusting the upper/lower limits might also be considered. Alternatively, an alternative approach can be trying other trend-following models such as moving averages cross method, which may have better results in ranging markets.
[Backup plan] ['Review market conditions to determine if they fit well into Bollinger breakout model', 'Consider adjusting parameters of EMA and OBV filter for optimization']
